title: Skip the Energy Gels: These 7 Grocery Store Alternatives Are Perfect Workout Fuels
content:
Sick of sports nutrition? We ranked and rated some of the most cost-effective, wallet-friendly snacks you can find in the shopping aisles.

Read the full article at Skip the Energy Gels: These 7 Grocery Store Alternatives Are Perfect Workout Fuels on Velo.
author: Jim Cotton
